text: The interplay of purple-blue light and modernity here stirs a sense of anticipation within me. As I press on through this glass boundary and enter the exhibition, I am both curious and slightly apprehensive. Reading the words about exposure and misunderstanding resonates with my present emotions. There’s a vulnerability in inhabiting such a visible, curated space—one that invites both self-reflection and shared understanding. I feel the weight of being observed, but also the excitement of engaging with the deeper questions this place poses.
